case_title: GREGORY BOLDS VS. STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-21-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED ORDER)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-03-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF GREGORY BOLDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: STEVEN CHENG) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOLDS, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED SEP-10-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOLDS, GREGORY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLDS, GREGORY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC. I CREDIT PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY THAT DEFENDANT WORKED ON HIS CAR BUT ITS PROBLEMS WERE NOT RESOLVED, BUT DEFENDANT PERFORMED WORK & INSTALLED PARTS ON AN OLDER CAR AND I FIND NO EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT GUARANTEED THE WORK WOULD RESOLVE ALL ISSUES WITH THE CAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,090.00 FILED BY BOLDS, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF GREGORY BOLDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVEN CHENG, OWNER. PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2018 - JUDGMENT.
